metadata.description: Production-ready Claude Code plugins from the Ultimate Guide

plugins.name: session-summary
plugins.description: Session analytics dashboard — 15 configurable sections displayed at session end (models, cost, cache, tools, files, git diff, RTK savings...)

plugins.name: security-suite
plugins.description: Security auditing pipeline — OWASP checks, vulnerability scanning, threat detection, cyber-defense multi-agent pipeline, and 13 protective hooks

plugins.name: devops-pipeline
plugins.description: CI/CD automation — git worktrees, deploy pipeline, canary monitoring, auto-format/test hooks, and GitHub Actions templates

plugins.name: release-automation
plugins.description: Release workflow — generate changelogs, release notes (3 formats), and social content (LinkedIn/Twitter/Slack/Newsletter) from git commits

plugins.name: code-quality
plugins.description: Code quality pipeline — SOLID refactoring, TDD workflow, GoF design patterns, performance optimization, and 6 specialist review agents

plugins.name: pr-workflow
plugins.description: PR and issue lifecycle — structured planning (CEO/Eng gates), PR creation, code review, issue triage, session handoffs

plugins.name: session-tools
plugins.description: Session productivity — cost/token monitoring (ccboard), voice refinement, context catchup, MCP integration templates, and 11 session hooks

plugins.name: ai-methodology
plugins.description: AI-assisted development methodology — scaffolding skills, talk pipeline (6 stages), landing page generator, context engineering, and design templates
